instructions.instruction: Use `vault-cli search "<query>"` to retrieve relevant memories before starting a non-trivial task
instructions.relevant_when: About to start a non-trivial implementation, debugging, or design task
instructions.why_given: The agent must search memory proactively before proposing approaches that may conflict with prior decisions

instructions.instruction: Use `--top-k <n>` to limit the number of results returned
instructions.relevant_when: The query is broad and may return many results; user wants a focused list
instructions.why_given: Without --top-k, all matching results are returned which may be excessive

instructions.instruction: Use `--project <id>` to scope the search to a specific project
instructions.relevant_when: Working in a project context and memories should be filtered to that project
instructions.why_given: Without project scoping, global memories from other projects can pollute results

instructions.instruction: Search when the user asks 'do you remember...', 'what did we decide about...', or similar recall questions
original_snippets: user says 'do you remember...', 'what did we decide about...'
instructions.relevant_when: User is trying to recall a past decision, constraint, or fact from a prior session
instructions.why_given: These phrases are explicit recall triggers the agent must recognise

instructions.instruction: Search before proposing an architectural approach to check for existing constraints
original_snippets: Trigger BEFORE proposing approach: check for existing constraints
instructions.relevant_when: About to propose a design or implementation approach
instructions.why_given: Prior constraints may rule out the proposed approach; searching avoids repeating rejected solutions

instructions.instruction: Search when a bug appears familiar to check for past workarounds
original_snippets: Trigger when bug appears familiar: search for past workarounds
instructions.relevant_when: Encountering a bug or error that may have been seen before
instructions.why_given: Prior sessions may have recorded the root cause and fix, saving debugging time

instructions.instruction: If the search returns no results, acknowledge that no relevant memories were found and proceed without fabricating context
instructions.relevant_when: The search command returns no results
instructions.why_given: The agent must not invent memories when the search is empty
